creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
When installing graphics/ImageMagick port without X11 installed and deselected in the config, two test are failing. Both reading or writing xwd files.

t/png/write.......ok                                                         
t/read............ok 1/48Readimage (input.xwd): Exception 420: no decode delegate for this image format `input.xwd' at t/subroutines.pl line 342.
t/read............FAILED test 42                                             
        Failed 1/48 tests, 97.92% okay
t/setattribute....ok                                                         
t/tiff/read.......ok                                                         
t/tiff/write......ok                                                         
t/write...........FAILED test 29                                             
        Failed 1/33 tests, 96.97% okay
t/zlib/read.......ok                                                         
t/zlib/write......ok                                                         
Failed Test Stat Wstat Total Fail  Failed  List of Failed
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
t/read.t                  48    1   2.08%  42
t/write.t                 33    1   3.03%  29
Failed 2/23 test scripts, 91.30% okay. 2/334 subtests failed, 99.40% okay.
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.3.5/PerlMagick.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.3.5.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.3.5.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick.

How-To-Repeat: Install graphics/ImageMagick port on a system without X11 and deslect X11 in the port config.
